news-global-econ.title: GOP can't agree on key part of Trump's housing affordability push as infighting continues
news-global-econ.description: Trump urged Congress to pass housing affordability legislation, but House Republicans balked at the Senate bill and pitched a modified rival proposal.

news-global-econ.title: This Midwestern state leads the nation in home foreclosures as US filings jump by 26%
news-global-econ.description: Indiana records the highest foreclosure rate in the nation as rising costs and mortgage rates put increasing financial pressure on homeowners nationwide.

news-global-econ.title: The CCP controls the most intimate elements of our life. Most Americans have no idea
news-global-econ.description: Critical minerals power daily life and U.S. defense. The DOMINANCE Act passed committee to counter China's grip on rare earth mining and refining.

news-global-econ.title: Musk’s xAI unveils first coding agent in bid to rival Anthropic
news-global-econ.description: Musk and xAI are racing to catch up to other AI companies on coding, a lucrative market for AI and an area where the billionaire admits his firm has fallen behind

news-global-econ.title: Xi’s threat to Trump cements Taiwan as top US-China risk
news-global-econ.description: Xi’s assertion that interfering with Taiwan could trigger a ‘highly dangerous situation’ for the world’s biggest economies marked his bluntest language yet on the topic

news-global-soc.title: Israel, Jews targeted worldwide as well-funded leftist, Islamist groups join for ‘Nakba 78’ protests
news-global-soc.description: About 425 anti-Israel groups are mobilizing coordinated Nakba 78 protests worldwide, with 736 events planned across 39 countries this weekend.

news-global-soc.title: Trump touts ‘fantastic trade deals’ in final Xi meeting amid tariff standoff
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump touts an incredible visit and fantastic trade deals with China after his final meeting with Xi, as Beijing agrees to order 200 Boeing jets.

news-global-soc.title: Trump says Xi agreed US became a ‘declining nation’ during Biden years
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump turns Xi Jinping's apparent swipe at Western decline into an attack on Biden, saying the U.S. "suffered immeasurably" under the prior administration.

news-global-soc.title: Exclusive: Sens. Cotton, Boozman, Cruz Ask Department of War to Invest in Untapped Domestic Lithium Supply
news-global-soc.description:
A letter to the Department of War in support of investment into domestic lithium supply chains, including a massive, untapped lithium deposit that stretches across the southern United States, was led by Sen. Tom Cotton (R-AR).
